overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring an ancient Greek village at night. The character walks through stone-paved paths, examines a tannery workshop with hanging leather hides, inspects a workbench with tools, and approaches a horse in a torch-lit settlement.

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a narrow cobblestone path into an ancient Greek village at night. Stone houses line the left side while wooden market structures with red fabric canopies appear ahead. The path is illuminated by torchlight as the character moves from the enclosed entrance into a more open courtyard area.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an open courtyard surrounded by stone walls and wooden scaffolding. The camera turns right toward a tannery workshop where leather hides hang from wooden frames. Ancient stone stairs and a tall cypress tree are visible in the background as the character approaches the workshop area.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the tannery workshop, walking on wooden planks beneath hanging leather hides and fabric strips. The area is dimly lit with stone walls on both sides. Large animal hides are stretched and mounted on the walls as the character examines the workspace.

segments.scene_description: The character examines a leather worker's corner with a detailed workbench featuring metal tools, pottery jars, and leather materials. The camera moves close to inspect a large animal hide mounted on the stone wall, then focuses on the workbench illuminated by a tall torch flame before turning toward stone stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper village level with horse stable area

segments.scene_description: The character ascends ancient stone stairs to an upper village level, passing wooden scaffolding and stone walls. Upon reaching the top, a gray horse stands near wooden posts, illuminated by torchlight. In the background, classical temple columns are visible against the night sky as the character approaches the horse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit ancient Greek village, transitioning from narrow cobblestone paths into the detailed interior of a workshop before ascending to an upper terrace. It begins by moving up a narrow path lined with stone houses and red fabric canopies, gradually opening into a courtyard surrounded by wooden scaffolding and a tall cypress tree. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts into a dimly lit tannery workshop where the character walks across wooden planks beneath hanging leather hides and fabric strips. The movement then slows to inspect a detailed workbench filled with metal tools and pottery jars before turning toward a set of stone stairs. Finally, the camera ascends these stairs to an upper level, passing more scaffolding to find a gray horse standing beneath the night sky with classical temple columns visible in the distance.
